description: Style Note Strikingly chic, this top from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Offering a flowy silhouette, you can pair this one with a pencil skirt or a pair of jeans for a casual to semi formal look. We think strappy sandals for your feet complements the look best. Product Details Peach top with a boat neck, has three quarter sleeves with a mid arm button tab and an inverted V pleat at the back Material and Care Polyester crepe Cold wash with like colours Do not iron, bleach or wring Dry inside out Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
